'''Brother Nicos Fate''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[X'Ting]] from [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]] where he was descended from 500 years of hive healers. A loyal supporter to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], he participated in the [[Mission to Ord Cestus]] where he assisted in healing wounded [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] and later killed.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
